ident_heading: Privacy Policy
heading_content_part: Privacy PolicyTerms and ConditionsPrivacy PolicyThis Privacy Policy governs the manner in which TMSOFT, LLC collects, uses, maintains and discloses information collected from users (each, a “User”) of thewww.tmsoft.comwebsite and products including software applications (“Site”). This privacy policy applies to the Site and all products and services offered by TMSOFT, LLC.

Users may be asked for, as appropriate, name and email address. Users may, however, visit our Site anonymously. We will collect personal identification information from Users only if they voluntarily submit such information to us. Users can always refuse to supply personally identification information, except that it may prevent them from engaging in certain Site related activities.

decoder_heading: Ads appearing on our site may be delivered to Users by advertising partners, who may set cookies.
ident_heading: Ads appearing on our site may be delivered to Users by advertising partners, who may set cookies.
heading_content_part: Ads appearing on our site may be delivered to Users by advertising partners, who may set cookies. These cookies allow the ad server to recognize your computer each time they send you an online advertisement to compile non personal identification information about you or others who use your computer. This information allows ad networks to, among other things, deliver targeted advertisements that they believe will be of most interest to you. To serve ads in services where cookie technology may not be available (for example, in mobile applications), ad networks may use technologies that perform similar functions to cookies. We cannot control or be held responsible for third parties’ privacy practices and content. If you click on a third-party advertisement or link, please understand that you are leaving the TMSOFT properties and any personal data you provide will not be covered by this Policy. This privacy policy does not cover the use of cookies or other similar technologies by any advertisers. For more information, see:
